professionalExpertise: By attracting professional expertise and employing leading assessment methodologies
footerDesc: Adroyts focuses on serving corporate clients in Saudi Arabia and other GCC markets by providing them with highly experienced professionals across key sectors.
aboutUsText1: With nearly two decades of experience, Adroits was founded in 2006 in Saudi Arabia, establishing itself as a leading provider of integrated professional solutions for human resource management and development.
desc1: To achieve this core objective, Adroyts is committed to enhancing organizational capabilities through a comprehensive portfolio of services that includes recruitment solutions, assessment center solutions, human capital consulting, and the Adroyts Academy. Every step is grounded in precise methodologies and global best practices, with a strategic focus on output quality and sustainable impact in the workplace.
desc2: From this standpoint, our priority revolves around client service. We focus on providing our partners with specialized and integrated solutions that deliver experienced leadership talent. This commitment has resulted in a strong track record serving over 00 entities across various sectors, reaffirming our dedication to building strong relationships based on mutual trust, accuracy, and meeting all requirements with excellence.
adroytsIntro2: For nearly two decades, Adroits has provided an integrated system of recruitment services, combining the depth of specialized knowledge of our consultants with effective access to an exclusive database. This integration ensures the attraction of talent that makes a difference, through customized solutions that align directly with our clients’ strategic goals.
readyForNextGenRecruitment: Discover the Future of Human Capital Today
startYourDigitalJourney: At Adroyts, we deliver integrated solutions across recruitment, assessment, development, and human capital consulting to support informed decisions and build impactful leadership.
helpMessage: We’re here to support your HR, recruitment, and talent development needs. Please fill out the form below and our team will get back to you shortly.
communicationValue: At Adroyts, we value meaningful communication and aim to respond promptly and professionally to all inquiries. Whether you’re seeking support or information about our services, this form will help us guide your message to the right team.
ourVisionDesc: To be a leading force in innovation and excellence, empowering our community through cutting-edge solutions and unwavering commitment.
ourMissionDesc: To deliver high-quality services with integrity and passion, fostering sustainable growth and meaningful impact for all our stakeholders.
discoverOpportunities: Discover opportunities to join Adroyts or become part of our talent network.
beliefStatement: At Adroyts, we believe in connecting exceptional talent with meaningful opportunities.
welcomeMessage: Whether you're looking to join our team or explore roles with our clients, you're in the right place.
startJourney: Start your journey with us and become part of a network that shapes the future of work.
registerInfo: Register to join Adroyts or to be considered for future opportunities.
explorePositions: Explore active positions and apply directly.
opportunityConsultant: Register as External Consultant / Trainer / Assessor
consentText: I consent to Adroyts processing my personal data for recruitment purposes.
exploreCurrentOpenings: Explore current openings at Adroyts and with our clients.
stayUpToDate: Stay up to date on the latest Adroyts news.
teamDescription: At the heart of Adroyts' system stands a team of specialized experts and consultants, distinguished by deep knowledge and accumulated professional experience across various sectors of human resource management. This distinguished team does not only provide services but ensures the highest levels of accuracy and effectiveness through strict adherence to professional and pioneering methodologies in all stages of human resource management and strategic partnership, including assessment processes, executive search, and qualitative recruitment. This performance is further strengthened by the firm commitment of the partnership to continuously develop the team's skills and capabilities, which guarantees the sustained quality of outputs, the effectiveness of our solutions, and the lasting value we provide to our clients.
valuesSectionSubtitle: Our values define how we work, how we serve, and how we build meaningful partnerships rooted in trust and excellence.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We maintain the highest ethical standards, ensuring transparency, confidentiality, and trust in every engagement.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We deliver superior quality through rigorous assessments, deep market research, and a commitment to continuous improvement.

values.title: Partnership
values.description: We collaborate closely with clients, becoming strategic allies who understand their vision and help build lasting success.

pillarsSectionSubtitle: Adroyts’ services stand firmly on three pillars that guarantee our clients the highest quality and sustainable impact:

pillars.title: Knowledge Depth
pillars.description: Solid professional experience, enlightened by a deep understanding of market needs and client challenges.

pillars.title: Strategic Focus
pillars.description: Comprehensive and precise analysis of each client’s requirements, ensuring uniquely tailored solutions.

pillars.title: Sustainable Relationship
pillars.description: Building long-term partnerships based on mutual trust, providing continuous support and advanced consulting without interruption.

boardDescription: Meet the leaders guiding our strategic vision
executiveDescription: The team responsible for operational excellence

items.title: Training Needs Analysis
items.desc: A systematic process to assess current and future knowledge and skill gaps in order to accurately identify real training needs.

items.title: Design & Implementation of Development Plans
items.desc: Developing comprehensive frameworks for training programs and learning pathways, with close supervision to ensure maximum impact.

items.title: Training Content & Curriculum Design
items.desc: Developing unique and effective learning content tailored to align with our clients’ objectives, technical standards, and job requirements.

items.name: Hogan Assessments
items.desc: Hogan Assessments has over 30 years of experience helping organizations significantly reduce employee turnover and increase productivity by hiring the right people, developing talent, and assessing leadership potential.

items.name: Saville Assessment
items.desc: Saville Assessment develops scientifically robust, workplace-relevant assessment tools that have transformed traditional evaluation approaches globally, enabling faster, fairer, and more accurate talent selection and development decisions.

items.name: Psytech International
items.desc: Psytech International is one of the leading developers of psychometric assessment tools, offering reliable tests to measure abilities and personality, helping organizations identify potential and enhance performance.

items.name: Talent Enterprise
items.desc: Talent Enterprise is a leading provider of talent assessment and development solutions, helping organizations improve HR decisions through innovative scientific assessment tools, advanced leadership development programs, and digital platforms that support talent acquisition and future leadership readiness.

items.title: Psychometric Assessments
items.desc: Scientific tools used to measure behavioral aspects, cognitive abilities, and personality traits of candidates.

items.title: Competency-Based Interviews
items.desc: Structured interviews focused on exploring candidates’ past behaviors in specific situations to predict future performance.

items.title: Case Study
items.desc: Practical work-related scenarios designed to simulate real workplace challenges faced by the candidate.

items.title: Group Discussion
items.desc: An activity where candidates are placed in a group setting to discuss a specific topic, allowing evaluation of their behaviors and interpersonal skills.

items.title: Role-Playing Activities
items.desc: Interactive exercises that simulate daily work situations to assess how candidates handle challenges in a realistic environment, providing accurate insights into behavioral and leadership skills.

items.title: 360-Degree Assessment
items.desc: A comprehensive evaluation methodology that gathers multi-source feedback on an individual’s performance (from supervisors, peers, subordinates, and self-assessment) to provide a holistic and realistic view of behavioral and leadership competencies and influence.

items.title: Professional Development
items.desc: Empowering individuals to develop their skills and build clear career paths that enhance performance and ensure continuity.

items.title: Individual Development Plans
items.desc: Conducting comprehensive individual assessments to identify core strengths and development needs.

items.title: High-Potential Talent Identification
items.desc: Identifying high-potential talents and supporting their readiness for future roles.

items.title: Employee Placement
items.desc: Aligning talents with suitable roles to ensure maximum productivity and stability.

items.title: Career Guidance
items.desc: Supporting individuals in making informed career decisions that enhance job satisfaction and performance.

items.title: Recruitment & Selection
items.desc: Selecting the most suitable candidates through objective assessment that improves decision quality and reduces risk.

items.title: Succession Planning
items.desc: Ensuring continuity of critical roles and building readiness for future leadership.

recruitmentMethodology.title: Our Recruitment Methodology
recruitmentMethodology.intro: At Adroyts, we follow a structured and precise methodology to ensure effective talent acquisition through the following steps:

steps.title: Information Gathering & Analysis
steps.desc: Conducting an in-depth analysis of the organizational and skill requirements for the vacant position.

steps.title: Talent Sourcing
steps.desc: Identifying and proactively targeting qualified talents in the local and regional markets.

steps.title: Interviewing & Assessment
steps.desc: Conducting comprehensive interviews to evaluate candidates’ suitability for the specified role.

steps.title: Shortlist Submission
steps.desc: Presenting a shortlist of the most qualified candidates to the client for review and interviews.

steps.title: Psychometric Assessments
steps.desc: Administering advanced behavioral and personality assessments to ensure alignment with role requirements.

steps.title: Reference Check
steps.desc: Verifying candidates’ professional background and past performance through authorized references.

steps.title: Offer Negotiation
steps.desc: Managing the negotiation process between the client and the candidate to ensure mutual agreement on final terms.

perf1: At the heart of Adroyts' system stands a team of specialized experts and consultants, distinguished by deep knowledge and accumulated professional experience in managing and developing human capital. This exceptional team does not merely provide services, but ensures the highest levels of accuracy and efficiency through the application of professional and pioneering methodologies across all stages of human resources management and strategic partnership, including:
perf2: This performance is further reinforced by the company's strong commitment to the continuous development of the team's skills and capabilities, which ensures the sustained quality of outputs, the effectiveness of our solutions, and the lasting value we provide to our clients.
governmentDesc: We support government entities in building efficient human capital systems, enhancing workforce performance, and fostering leadership capabilities to ensure sustainable growth and public service excellence
realEstateDesc: We help real estate companies attract top talent, optimize organizational structures, and develop effective leadership to drive growth and deliver exceptional customer value.
financeDesc: We empower financial institutions to build high-performing teams, strengthen compliance culture, and enhance leadership effectiveness for long-term stability and innovation.
educationDesc: We partner with educational institutions to develop qualified talent, improve staff engagement, and foster leadership that drives academic excellence and institutional success.
energyDesc: We assist energy sector organizations in optimizing workforce capabilities, promoting safety culture, and preparing leaders to navigate the evolving challenges of a dynamic industry.
caseStudiesDesc:
Our case studies show real examples of how we help companies find the right people and improve their hiring process.
Each story explains the company’s problem, what we did to solve it, and the results they achieved.
These examples show how our recruitment and HR solutions make hiring faster, easier, and more effective.
whySectionTitle: Your Strategic Partner in Leadership & Talent Solutions
whySectionParagraph: At ADROYTS, we combine deep market insight, global networks, and a commitment to excellence to deliver leadership and HR solutions that transform organizations. We focus on understanding your culture, challenges, and long-term goals to provide talent that drives meaningful impact.
adroytsIntro: For nearly two decades, Adroyts has been a trusted recruitment partner for organizations across Saudi Arabia. We provide end-to-end hiring solutions that balance precision, speed, and cultural alignment—helping clients secure the right talent every time.
recruitmentSolutions: Recruitment Solutions that Empower Organizations Since 2006
needServiceContactUs: If You Need Any Service Contact With Us

executiveSearch.title: Executive Search
executiveSearch.descriptionShort: Executive search helps you find the best executive leaders for your company quickly and professionally.
executiveSearch.description:
- Adroits specializes in Executive Search as a strategic pillar for attracting top leadership.
- We do not just search for candidates; we aim to discover leaders capable of making a qualitative leap and direct impact on organizational performance.
- We rely on a precise and comprehensive methodology to ensure the desired impact, which includes:
  1. In-depth analysis of client needs.
  2. Accurate identification of suitable leadership competencies.
  3. Professional evaluation of top-tier candidates.
  4. Final recommendations based on evidence demonstrating full alignment with success requirements.
- We aim to achieve a clear strategic vision for the organizations we serve.
executiveSearch.methodologyIntro: At Adroyts, we follow a methodical and precise approach to guarantee the attraction of senior leadership:

1.title: Gathering and Analyzing Job Vacancy Information
1.details: Conducting an in-depth analysis of the organizational and skill requirements of the vacant position.

2.title: Searching for Suitable Competencies
2.details: Identifying leadership competencies and proactively targeting them in the local and regional market.

3.title: Interviewing and Evaluating Candidates
3.details: Conducting in-depth interviews to assess the suitability of candidates for the specified role.

4.title: Submitting the Candidate List to the Client
4.details: Providing a shortlist of the most qualified leaders to the client for review and interviews.

5.title: Conducting Psychometric Tests for Candidates
5.details: Applying advanced behavioral and personality assessments to ensure cultural and leadership compatibility.

6.title: Candidate Reference Check
6.details: Verifying the professional record and past performance of candidates through trusted references.

7.title: Negotiating the Job Offer
7.details: Managing the negotiation process between the client and the candidate to ensure agreement on final terms.

8.title: Completing the Executive Search Assignment
8.details: Successfully finalizing the process and ensuring the smooth transition of the new leader to start their duties.

professionalSearch.title: Professional Search
professionalSearch.descriptionShort: We provide professional search services to find the right specialized talents for your company’s needs.
professionalSearch.description: We assist organizations in reaching the most suitable candidates through a precise professional search that considers experience compatibility with organizational culture and goals. We rely on a clear market vision and comprehensive evaluation mechanisms to ensure selecting competencies capable of integration and delivering long-term institutional value. Our goal: supporting work teams, enhancing performance, and building sustainable recruitment partnerships.

recruitmentOutsourcing.title: Recruitment Process Outsourcing
recruitmentOutsourcing.descriptionShort: Recruitment Process Outsourcing offers you a full recruitment team managing hiring processes efficiently.
recruitmentOutsourcing.description: Adroyts offers recruitment outsourcing solutions through an operational model that acts as an extension of the human resources system within organizations. The service includes providing specialized recruitment teams on a full-time or part-time basis, working according to strict professional standards to consolidate recruitment operations and improve candidate quality. The company also leverages extensive expertise in attracting competencies to ensure their alignment with client needs.

academy.title: Adroits Academy
academy.description: Adroits Academy represents the knowledge and training arm of the company, specializing in leadership development and institutional capability building through precisely designed training programs that deliver maximum impact. The Academy offers an integrated suite of developmental solutions that go beyond conventional training, relying on in-depth needs analysis and the design of customized training packages. This approach ensures full alignment of programs with organizations’ strategic objectives and future directions, in line with Saudi Vision 2030 for human capital development.

leadershipPrograms.title: Leadership Development Programs
leadershipPrograms.description: Specialized programs designed to build and enhance leadership skills, decision-making capabilities, and team management across various leadership and supervisory levels.

softSkillsPrograms.title: Soft Skills Programs
softSkillsPrograms.description: Programs focused on developing essential soft and behavioral skills for all job levels, including but not limited to communication, teamwork, emotional intelligence, and professionalism in the workplace.

professionalPrograms.title: Professional & Specialized Programs
professionalPrograms.description: Training solutions aimed at developing functional and specialized skills based on organizational needs and the nature of job roles.

customPrograms.title: Customized Training Programs
customPrograms.description: Designing and delivering tailored training programs to address specific organizational challenges, aligned with the organization’s strategy and culture.

academicCollaboration.description1: An international business school founded in France in 1957, offering master's and doctoral programs in business administration. It is renowned for its cultural diversity and focus on leadership and innovation in global business.
academicCollaboration.description2: London Business School is one of the top-ranked institutions globally in leadership training, offering specialized programs in strategy, leadership, and women's leadership. It also provides programs supporting entrepreneurship.
academicCollaboration.description3: A globally leading educational institution affiliated with Harvard University, offering specialized programs in business management, leadership, and entrepreneurship.
academicCollaboration.description4: With Spain’s IE University, we can build long-term learning journeys for leaders that include lectures, coaching sessions, and various activities.
academicCollaboration.description5: Thunderbird School of Global Management, founded in 1946 and part of Arizona State University, specializes in leadership development, international management, and political economy.
academicCollaboration.description6: A British institute specializing in leadership programs and coaching with over fifty years of leadership development experience, empowering leaders to be more impactful and prepared for all kinds of change.
academicCollaboration.description7: London Centre of Excellence is a professional training and consulting center based in the UK, specializing in international courses and professional development. It offers over 400 courses covering areas such as leadership, HR, accounting, and more across multiple cities worldwide.

talentAssessment.title: Talent Assessment
talentAssessment.description: Adroits provides advanced talent assessment solutions based on scientific tools and professional standards to measure capabilities, competencies, and workplace behaviors. These assessments are designed to support recruitment and development decisions, as well as to determine candidates’ suitability for professional roles.

psychometricAssessments.title: Psychometric Assessments
psychometricAssessments.description: Standardized scientific tools used to measure candidates’ behavioral traits, cognitive abilities, and personality characteristics.

competencyBasedInterviews.title: Competency-Based Interviews
competencyBasedInterviews.description: Structured interviews focused on exploring candidates’ past behaviors in specific situations, enabling accurate prediction of future performance.

caseStudy.title: Case Study
caseStudy.description: Practical assessment exercises that simulate real business scenarios, allowing candidates to demonstrate analytical thinking, problem-solving abilities, and decision-making skills.

groupDiscussion.title: Group Discussion
groupDiscussion.description: An interactive activity where candidates participate in group discussions around a defined topic, used to evaluate communication skills, leadership potential, and teamwork.

rolePlaying.title: Role-Playing Activities
rolePlaying.description: Interactive simulations that replicate real workplace situations to assess how candidates respond to challenges in realistic environments, providing accurate evaluation of behavioral and leadership skills.

hrConsulting.title: Human Resources Consulting
hrConsulting.description2: To turn operational challenges into growth opportunities, Adroyts offers comprehensive human resources consulting services. We collaborate closely with clients to understand their needs and provide strategic advice for sound decision-making, including project evaluation, merger and acquisition planning support, and risk assessment related to layoffs. We also assist in developing HR policies and efficiently managing human capital, serving startups and large companies alike to achieve sustainable growth and clear development plans.
hrConsulting.description: To turn operational challenges into growth opportunities, Adroits offers a comprehensive suite of human resources consulting services. Today, HR consulting is a strategic focal point with a new dimension in the business world. We work closely with our clients to understand their needs and provide consultations that enable them to make sound decisions supporting their future path. This includes evaluating current projects to ensure optimal deployment of skills within the organization, providing support in merger or acquisition planning, and assessing risks related to layoffs, redundancies, and associated outcomes. We also collaborate with organizations to develop and implement HR policies and procedures and manage human capital efficiently. Our services extend from startups to large enterprises aiming to develop integrated HR strategies that contribute to sustainable growth and clear development plans.

hrStrategy.title: HR Strategy Development
hrStrategy.description: Designing a comprehensive long-term plan to ensure alignment of HR functions with the overall strategic goals of the organization.

organizationalDevelopment.title: Organizational Development (Structuring)
organizationalDevelopment.description: Developing a comprehensive long-term plan to ensure alignment of HR functions with the overall strategic goals of the organization.

hrManual.title: HR Manual
hrManual.description: Preparing a comprehensive document outlining the internal policies, procedures, and regulations governing the relationship between employees and the organization.

hrAudits.title: HR Audits
hrAudits.description: Systematic evaluation of the effectiveness and efficiency of current HR systems and processes to identify strengths and areas for improvement.

jobAnalysis.title: Job Analysis
jobAnalysis.description: A comprehensive process that includes job evaluation, grading system determination, job description development, and establishing fair and competitive salary scales.

successionPlanning.title: Succession Planning
successionPlanning.description: Design and develop a succession strategy, identify key and critical roles, and build evaluation criteria.

hrOutsourcing.title: HR Outsourcing
hrOutsourcing.description: Providing specialized services to manage specific HR tasks on behalf of the client, enabling them to focus on strategic activities.
